the reasons we built it in temper

the advantages of maintaining this in one language

the security features baked in using secure composition

the advantages of literate programming for understanding the library

the ability to patch security holes quickly if they do come up

the advantages of having good guardrails and safe practices in temper to allow better AI driven development

style it simply and in black and white style like the slide decks HTML conditions"}
